name: USA Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: USA Pawn & Jewelry is a Phoenix-based pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry buying, and discounted pre-owned retail merchandise with flexible payment options.
description_long:
USA Pawn & Jewelry operates a pawn shop located at 3046 North 16th Street in Phoenix, Arizona. The business is part of the EZPAWN family of stores and positions itself as a community-focused financial service provider offering quick cash access through collateral-based transactions. The store maintains extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays and Saturdays, 12pm-5pm Sundays) to serve local customers seeking immediate liquidity.

The company offers multiple revenue streams centered on collateral lending and merchandise sales. Primary services include pawn loans (customers bring items in decent condition for cash advances), gold and diamond buying (testing precious metals to determine fair prices), retail sales of pre-owned electronics and brand-name merchandise at 25-70% discounts, and specialized services like firearms sales and auto loans. They also provide layaway options (10% down with monthly payments) and "Take Today" flexible payment plans through third-party partners for up to 12 months. An online inventory system and Instant Quote tool for electronics allow customers to assess item values before visiting.

USA Pawn & Jewelry differentiates itself through the EZ+ Rewards Program, which allows customers to manage pawn transactions and earn points online, though online payments are explicitly not available in Arizona (where this location operates). They offer protection plans for jewelry (VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and lifetime or annual enrollment) and products (covering electronics and equipment). The business emphasizes expert evaluation, competitive pricing, and convenient access to credit for customers who may lack traditional banking relationships or need immediate cash.

This is a legitimate pawn shop model with transparent services, but customers should understand that pawn loans are subject to terms, fees, and interest rates not detailed on this webpage. The restriction on online payments in Arizona limits digital convenience for this specific location. Pawning items means surrendering collateral with time-limited redemption periods, and retail merchandise is entirely pre-owned with no manufacturer warranty or affiliation. The company's focus on quick liquidity solutions positions it for consumers facing financial emergencies rather than those seeking traditional credit-building or debt management.
pros: Instant cash advances on collateral with no credit check required
Expert testing and fair pricing on precious metals and diamonds
Extended store hours including Saturdays and Sundays for accessibility
Large inventory of discounted pre-owned electronics and brand merchandise (25-70% off)
Multiple cash-access options including pawn loans, gold buying, and merchandise sales
EZ+ Rewards Program allows earning points on eligible transactions
Instant Quote tool for electronics provides estimated value online before visiting
cons: Pawn loans carry undisclosed fees and interest rates not detailed on website
Online payment functionality explicitly unavailable in Arizona (where this location operates)
Items pawned are subject to time-limited redemption periods—failure to repay means loss of collateral
All retail merchandise is pre-owned with no manufacturer warranty, affiliation, or brand endorsement
Collateral-based lending perpetuates short-term financial cycles rather than building creditworthiness
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash ($100-$5K+) who have valuable items to pledge as collateral
People with poor or no credit history seeking loans without credit checks or underwriting
Customers looking to sell gold, jewelry, diamonds, or electronics for quick cash
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking discounted pre-owned electronics and brand-name merchandise
diagnosis: USA Pawn & Jewelry is best for consumers facing immediate financial emergencies who own valuable collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools, firearms) and cannot access traditional bank loans due to poor credit or time constraints. The critical caveat is that pawn loans are short-term liquidity solutions that prioritize quick cash over financial stability—customers must redeem collateral within a specified timeframe or lose their items permanently, and detailed fee/interest structures are not disclosed on their website, requiring in-person consultation.
services: Gold and diamond buying with expert testing
Retail sales of pre-owned electronics, jewelry, tools, fashion, and gaming items
Layaway payment plans (10% down, monthly installments)
Take Today flexible payment options (up to 12 months, third-party financed)
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
EZ+ Rewards Program with points earning and online transaction management
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan (guaranteed loan amounts, trade-up benefits, free cleaning)
Product Protection Plans (coverage for electronics and equipment)
